english_name: The First Epistle General of Peter

verses.latin_vulgate: Seniores ergo, qui in vobis sunt, obsecro, consenior et testis Christi passionum: qui et ejus, quæ in futuro revelanda est, gloriæ communicator:
verses.greek_textus_receptus: πρεσβυτέρους τοὺς ἐν ὑμῖν παρακαλῶ ὁ συμπρεσβύτερος καὶ μάρτυς τῶν τοῦ χριστοῦ παθημάτων ὁ καὶ τῆς μελλούσης ἀποκαλύπτεσθαι δόξης κοινωνός
verses.king_james: The elders which are among you I exhort, who am also an elder, and a witness of the sufferings of Christ, and also a partaker of the glory that shall be revealed:

verses.latin_vulgate: pascite qui in vobis est gregem Dei, providentes non coacte, sed spontanee secundum Deum: neque turpis lucri gratia, sed voluntarie:
verses.greek_textus_receptus: ποιμάνατε τὸ ἐν ὑμῖν ποίμνιον τοῦ θεοῦ ἐπισκοποῦντες μὴ ἀναγκαστῶς ἀλλ᾽ ἑκουσίως μηδὲ αἰσχροκερδῶς ἀλλὰ προθύμως
verses.king_james: Feed the flock of God which is among you, taking the oversight *thereof*, not by constraint, but willingly; not for filthy lucre, but of a ready mind;

verses.latin_vulgate: neque ut dominantes in cleris, sed forma facti gregis ex animo.
verses.greek_textus_receptus: μηδ ὡς κατακυριεύοντες τῶν κλήρων ἀλλὰ τύποι γινόμενοι τοῦ ποιμνίου
verses.king_james: Neither as being lords over *God's* heritage, but being ensamples to the flock.

verses.latin_vulgate: Et cum apparuerit princeps pastorum, percipietis immarcescibilem gloriæ coronam.
verses.greek_textus_receptus: καὶ φανερωθέντος τοῦ ἀρχιποίμενος κομιεῖσθε τὸν ἀμαράντινον τῆς δόξης στέφανον
verses.king_james: And when the chief Shepherd shall appear, ye shall receive a crown of glory that fadeth not away.

verses.latin_vulgate: Similiter adolescentes subditi estote senioribus. Omnes autem invicem humilitatem insinuate, quia Deus superbis resistit, humilibus autem dat gratiam.
verses.greek_textus_receptus: ὁμοίως νεώτεροι ὑποτάγητε πρεσβυτέροις πάντες δὲ ἀλλήλοις ὑποτασσόμενοι τὴν ταπεινοφροσύνην ἐγκομβώσασθε ὅτι ὁ θεὸς ὑπερηφάνοις ἀντιτάσσεται ταπεινοῖς δὲ δίδωσιν χάριν
verses.king_james: Likewise, ye younger, submit yourselves unto the elder. Yea, all *of you* be subject one to another, and be clothed with humility: for God resisteth the proud, and giveth grace to the humble.

verses.latin_vulgate: Humiliamini igitur sub potenti manu Dei, ut vos exaltet in tempore visitationis:
verses.greek_textus_receptus: ταπεινώθητε οὖν ὑπὸ τὴν κραταιὰν χεῖρα τοῦ θεοῦ ἵνα ὑμᾶς ὑψώσῃ ἐν καιρῷ
verses.king_james: Humble yourselves therefore under the mighty hand of God, that he may exalt you in due time:

verses.latin_vulgate: omnem sollicitudinem vestram projicientes in eum, quoniam ipsi cura est de vobis.
verses.greek_textus_receptus: πᾶσαν τὴν μέριμναν ὑμῶν ἐπιῤῥίψαντες ἐπ᾽ αὐτόν ὅτι αὐτῷ μέλει περὶ ὑμῶν
verses.king_james: Casting all your care upon him; for he careth for you.

verses.latin_vulgate: Sobrii estote, et vigilate: quia adversarius vester diabolus tamquam leo rugiens circuit, quærens quem devoret:
verses.greek_textus_receptus: νήψατε γρηγορήσατε ὅτι ὁ ἀντίδικος ὑμῶν διάβολος ὡς λέων ὠρυόμενος περιπατεῖ ζητῶν τινα καταπίῃ
verses.king_james: Be sober, be vigilant; because your adversary the devil, as a roaring lion, walketh about, seeking whom he may devour:

verses.latin_vulgate: cui resistite fortes in fide: scientes eamdem passionem ei quæ in mundo est vestræ fraternitati fieri.
verses.greek_textus_receptus: ᾧ ἀντίστητε στερεοὶ τῇ πίστει εἰδότες τὰ αὐτὰ τῶν παθημάτων τῇ ἐν κόσμῳ ὑμῶν ἀδελφότητι ἐπιτελεῖσθαι
verses.king_james: Whom resist stedfast in the faith, knowing that the same afflictions are accomplished in your brethren that are in the world.

verses.latin_vulgate: Deus autem omnis gratiæ, qui vocavit nos in æternam suam gloriam in Christo Jesu, modicum passos ipse perficiet, confirmabit, solidabitque.
verses.greek_textus_receptus: ὁ δὲ θεὸς πάσης χάριτος ὁ καλέσας ἡμᾶς εἰς τὴν αἰώνιον αὐτοῦ δόξαν ἐν χριστῷ ἰησοῦ ὀλίγον παθόντας αὐτὸς καταρτίσαι ὑμᾶς στηρίξαι σθενώσαι θεμελιώσαι
verses.king_james: But the God of all grace, who hath called us unto his eternal glory by Christ Jesus, after that ye have suffered a while, make you perfect, stablish, strengthen, settle *you*.

verses.latin_vulgate: Ipsi gloria, et imperium in sæcula sæculorum. Amen.
verses.greek_textus_receptus: αὐτῷ ἡ δόξα καὶ τὸ κράτος εἰς τοὺς αἰῶνας τῶν αἰώνων ἀμήν
verses.king_james: To him *be* glory and dominion for ever and ever. Amen.

verses.latin_vulgate: Per Silvanum fidelem fratrem vobis, ut arbitror, breviter scripsi: obsecrans et contestans, hanc esse veram gratiam Dei, in qua statis.
verses.greek_textus_receptus: διὰ σιλουανοῦ ὑμῖν τοῦ πιστοῦ ἀδελφοῦ ὡς λογίζομαι δι᾽ ὀλίγων ἔγραψα παρακαλῶν καὶ ἐπιμαρτυρῶν ταύτην εἶναι ἀληθῆ χάριν τοῦ θεοῦ εἰς ἣν ἑστήκατε
verses.king_james: By Silvanus, a faithful brother unto you, as I suppose, I have written briefly, exhorting, and testifying that this is the true grace of God wherein ye stand.

verses.latin_vulgate: Salutat vos ecclesia quæ est in Babylone coëlecta, et Marcus filius meus.
verses.greek_textus_receptus: ἀσπάζεται ὑμᾶς ἡ ἐν βαβυλῶνι συνεκλεκτὴ καὶ μᾶρκος ὁ υἱός μου
verses.king_james: The *church that is* at Babylon, elected together with *you*, saluteth you; and *so doth* Marcus my son.

verses.latin_vulgate: Salutate invicem in osculo sancto. Gratia vobis omnibus qui estis in Christo Jesu. Amen.
verses.greek_textus_receptus: ἀσπάσασθε ἀλλήλους ἐν φιλήματι ἀγάπης εἰρήνη ὑμῖν πᾶσιν τοῖς ἐν χριστῷ ἰησοῦ ἀμὴν
verses.king_james: Greet ye one another with a kiss of charity. Peace *be* with you all that are in Christ Jesus. Amen.
